meta.title: ClipQuiz — Guess from Clips, Images & Audio
meta.description: The global guessing game platform. Play image, crop & music quizzes. Beat the percentile. Go viral.

hero.title: Guess. Compete.
hero.subtitle: Image quizzes. Cropped close-ups. Music clips. Type your answer, beat the crowd, and share your rank.

image.title: Image Quiz
image.desc: See the picture. Type the answer. Classic visual trivia.

crop.title: Crop Challenge
crop.desc: Only a tiny slice is shown. Can you still recognize it?

audio.title: Audio Clip
audio.desc: Hear a few seconds of a song. Name it before time runs out.

quiz.question: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.audioHint: Audio only — no video or title shown

results.title: Your Results
results.shareText: I scored {score}/{total} on "{title}" — Top {percent}%! Can you beat me?

create.title: Create Your Quiz
create.subtitle: Build a quiz in minutes. Share the link. Watch it blow up.
create.answersHelp: Up to {max} accepted answers, one per line (spaces ignored when checking)
create.successDesc: Share your quiz and challenge the world.
create.loginNote: No account needed — just pick a creator name

step1.title: Pick a Quiz
step1.desc: Browse trending quizzes or search by category.

step2.title: Type Your Answers
step2.desc: No multiple choice — type what you know. Partial matches count.

step3.title: Beat the Crowd
step3.desc: See your percentile rank and share your score with friends.

footer.tagline: Made for streamers, friend groups, and trivia addicts worldwide.

ads.label: Advertisement
ads.placeholder: Ad space — live ads appear after AdSense approval

cookies.message: We use cookies for site functionality and Google AdSense ads. Third parties, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on your visits.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: ClipQuiz operates a free online quiz platform. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: Quiz content you create, quiz scores, technical data (IP, browser), and cookies for preferences and advertising.

sections.title: Google AdSense
sections.body:
We use Google AdSense (Publisher ID: pub-4911271163170466). Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits.

Opt out of personalized ads: https://www.google.com/settings/ads

Also visit www.aboutads.info

How Google uses data: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

sections.title: User Content
sections.body: Quizzes you create are public. Do not submit illegal or infringing content.

sections.title: Acceptance
sections.body: By using ClipQuiz you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: Service
sections.body: ClipQuiz provides image, crop, and audio guessing quizzes as-is without warranty.

sections.title: User Content
sections.body: You are responsible for quizzes you create. No illegal, hateful, or infringing content.

sections.title: Age
sections.body: You must be at least 13 years old. Users under 18 need parental consent.

about.title: About ClipQuiz
about.intro: ClipQuiz is a global guessing game platform — image, crop, and music quizzes in 5 languages.

sections.title: Features
sections.body: 42+ quiz sets, percentile rankings, quiz creation without an account, and mobile-friendly design.

sections.title: Content
sections.body: Original seed quizzes plus user-created content. Play for free.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Questions, feedback, or content reports — reach out anytime.

sections.title: Content Reports
sections.body: Email us with the quiz link and reason. We review promptly.

sections.title: Privacy
sections.body: Request deletion of user-created quizzes via email with the quiz ID.
